name: Kagami
message: "Takashima-san, why are you clinging to Yuki? It's not normal."
Kagami tried to pull Takashima-san away from me, but Takashima-san was holding onto to my clothes tight. I worried that they would stretch out my sleeves at this rate.

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes... Good morning."
Takashima-san grabbed me tightly so she wouldn't be pulled away.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Don't fight, you two..."
Tsukasa looked like a zombie, with her eyes half open and her arms out in front of her.

name: Yuki
message: "I didn't sleep a wink."
They kept me up all night, and before I knew it, it was morning.
I looked at the clock on the wall, quietly ticking away.

name: Yuki
message: "Man, it's already ten o'clock."

name: Kagami
message: "Hm? What?"
Following my gaze, Kagami looked at the clock.

name: Kagami
message: "Oh, you're right. Huh? It was midnight the last time I looked... Yuki, is your clock running backward? It's gotta be broken."
The only thing broken around here was Kagami's head. Or more accurately, her sense of time. Unfortunately, I was too tired to argue with her.

name: Yuki
message: "It's morning. Ten in the morning."

name: Kagami
message: "Huh? Oh, I see. It's already ten in the morning... Ten in the morning..."

name: Kagami
message: "Ten in the morning?!"
Kagami jumped to her feet.

name: Kagami
message: "Wha―! The sky's blue! It really is morning!"
Kagami was speechless when she opened the curtains.

name: Kagami
message: "I'm such a dumb, dumb, dummy! Wh-What am I doing?!"
Kagami hitting herself on the head over and over was a rare sight indeed.

name: Kagami
message: "Tsukasa! Get up!"
Kagami jumped on Tsukasa and shook her shoulders. Atop them, Tsukasa's head bobbed back and forth.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Oneeeeee-chaaaaaan, y-you just told me to go back to sleep."
Tsukasa raised her voice in complaint.

name: Kagami
message: "What time do you think it is?! It's ten in the morning! If you don't get up, we're going to be late, or rather, we're already really, really late! Get up already!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Mmm, okaaaay."
Tsukasa yawned and raised her hands to the buttons of her pajamas.

name: Kagami
message: "Tsukasa! Your bra is showing!"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"
Oh, her bra really was...

name: Kagami
message: "Don't look!"

name: Yuki
message: "That hurts."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yuki-sama, are you all right?"
Takashima-san looked up at me, her arms still wrapped around my waist.

name: Yuki
message: "Uh, yeah..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Kagami-san, I don't think you should say with your fist what you can't with your mouth."

name: Yuki
message: "You're right about that. Um, this might be an abrupt change of topic, but how long are you planning on clinging to me, Takashima-san?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh? Oh... E-Excuse me."
Takashima-san pulled away from me in an instant, then lowered her head in a deep bow.

name: Yuki
message: "No, no, it's not like it was unpleasant. I just wanted to ask."

name: Kagami
message: "Yuki, stop goofing around and get ready."

name: Yuki
message: "Get ready? For what, exactly?"

name: Kagami
message: "What? To go to school, of course. Shouldn't your brain have matured at your age?"

name: Yuki
message: "You're the stupid one. There's no way I can go to school after being up all night. Today, I'm skipping school and sleeping. That's all."
I dropped back into bed.

name: Kagami
message: "As if. Get! Up! Now!"
She prodded my head with her foot.

name: Yuki
message: "Ooh... You shouldn't step on people."

name: Kagami
message: "You shouldn't skip school."

name: Yuki
message: "I'm not sure about that. I don't think what you're doing is good at all."

name: Kagami
message: "What are you talking about?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, since you're using your foot, it makes me think of how you don't wear those childish panties anymore. You've grown so much."

name: Kagami
message: "Wh-Wh-Whaaa―!"
When she noticed where I was looking, her face went deep red.

name: Kagami
message: "Yuki, you dumbass!"

name: Yuki
message: "Ow, ow, ow... She kicked me in the face."
Kagami walked over to the sink, her shoulders stiff with anger.

name: Yuki
message: "Why'd you kick me? You're the one who showed them to me."
And furthermore, why was she so mad about someone of the same gender seeing her underwear?

name: Kagami
message: "Anyway, you need to get up!"

name: Yuki
message: "All right."
After saying that, I noticed that Kagami had disappeared somewhere.
Maybe she was in the bathroom?
Oh, I guess she came back.

name: Yuki
message: "Hm? What's wrong?"
She kicked me a second time.
And then she walked away.
What's up with her?

name: Yuki
message: "Ow, ow, ow... Why'd she hit me again?! Jeez, this is abuse!"

name: Yuki
message: "I'm mad. If she's going to do that, I have something for her too."
Five minutes passed.

name: Yuki
message: "Zzzzzz..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Hmm, mmph..."

name: Kagami
message: "Hey! What are you doing?! Tsukasa, you too?! I only looked away for a second!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, they left a message for you."

name: Kagami
message: "A message?"

name: Zakuro
message: "'I went to sleep a second time because you kicked me a second time. Respectfully yours.'"

name: Kagami
message: "There's nothing even remotely respectful about that idiot's message."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? What is it? A housefire?"
Squinting, I saw Kagami beating a frying pan with a ladle.

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, is that a new game of yours? It looks like fun."

name: Kagami
message: "How does this look like a game?! Get up already!"

name: Yuki
message: "Like I said, I'm skipping."

name: Kagami
message: "I won't let you do that."

name: Yuki
message: "Excuse me, whose fault do you think it was that I couldn't sleep?"

name: Kagami
message: "Th-That's..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ahaha. Nothing she can say to that."

name: Zakuro
message: "That's right. Yuki-sama was trying her best to sleep."

name: Kagami
message: "It was... our fault, I guess... But still!"

name: Yuki
message: "But still?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, people are guaranteed to make mistakes. There's no point in worrying about it."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes, so you should go ahead and get back to sleep."
Takashima-san latched onto my arm again.

name: Kagami
message: "What?! Wh-Why are you getting into her bed?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Because I'm the maid. I thought I should sleep with her so she can relax."
Two soft objects were being pushed against my arm.
When my eyes shifted in their direction, I was met with Takashima-san's kind smile.

name: Zakuro
message: "It was our fault she couldn't sleep, so I have to make sure she can sleep this time."

name: Kagami
message: "Why would you need to do that?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Because I'm playing the role of the maid, of course."

name: Kagami
message: "Th-The role... Th-That again..."

name: Kagami
message: "Fine."

name: Kagami
message: "If that's what you want, then fine. I'll take the day off too."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? That's no good. Isn't that skipping school?"

name: Kagami
message: "Look who's talking."
Kagami held her fist out in front of my face and smiled.

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, uh, doing it once in a while doesn't hurt."

name: Yuki
message: "But why do you suddenly want to skip too?"

name: Kagami
message: "W-Well..."
Kagami looked away and spoke in a quiet voice.

name: Kagami
message: "If Takashima-san's role is the maid, then I'm the childhood friend, right? I-I should act like this, shouldn't I?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? Is that what the childhood friend character is supposed to do?"

name: Kagami
message: "I don't know! All I know is that the childhood friend wouldn't leave you and Takashima-san alone like that!"

name: Yuki
message: "O-Okay..."
I wondered why Kagami was so upset.

name: Yuki
message: "But still, it's not like we'd be alone. Look."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Hmm... ha... hmm..."

name: Kagami
message: "That's right. The self-proclaimed little sister character is here too."
Aren't we all self-proclaimed characters in a way?
Then I understood. She thought the childhood friend character was for real, unlike the other two of them.

name: Kagami
message: "I'd like to make Tsukasa go to school, but at this point, well..."
Tsukasa was curled up and sleeping happily.

name: Kagami
message: "She needs a full eight hours of sleep to function. We were up till morning, so she probably won't wake up till after noon."

name: Kagami
message: "Even if you two wouldn't be alone, I can't leave my sister behind."

name: Kagami
message: "Jeez."
In the end, we all ended up going back to sleep.
Before we realized it, the sun was setting.
Time passed in the blink of an eye.

name: Zakuro
message: "Yuki-sama, I'm making dinner. What would you like?"

name: Yuki
message: "Um, well, nothing in particular, but is there enough in the fridge to make anything?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I just checked. There's enough to make curry or stew."

name: Yuki
message: "Okay, how about curry?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "I love curry."

name: Kagami
message: "Curry? That sounds good."

name: Zakuro
message: "Well then, I'll get started. You can chat for a while until it's done."
Takashima-san gave a small bow and headed into the kitchen.

name: Yuki
message: "Hmm... Chat, huh?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "It feels like you suddenly got rich. Takashima-san is just like a real maid."

name: Tsukasa
message: "All right, I'll do my best to act like a real little sister, too."

name: Kagami
message: "Why do you need to do that?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Huh? That's the promise we made so that we could stay here, right?"

name: Kagami
message: "But wasn't that just an excuse for us to stay?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Still, a promise is a promise."

name: Kagami
message: "W-Well then, how should I act out my part?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "You're fine just as you are. You really are her childhood friend, after all."

name: Kagami
message: "But so are you."

name: Tsukasa
message: "I wanted to play the little sister role."

name: Kagami
message: "But you really are my little sister."

name: Tsukasa
message: "But that's not my role, is it? I wanted to try being Yuki's little sister."

name: Kagami
message: "Why's that?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Hehehe. Because we're twins, right?"

name: Kagami
message: "Because we're twins?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yeah. The desire to be in the role of a childhood friend that could fall in love with you, and the desire to be a little sister and have the intimate relationship of siblings."

name: Tsukasa
message: "These ambivalent feelings have taken the shape of twins, haven't they?"

name: Kagami
message: "What do you mean, taken the shape? We've been twins since we were born."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Oh, no. Maybe in the sense of our destinies?"

name: Kagami
message: "What's that mean?"

name: Kagami
message: "But anyway, I can't sit here and laze around while Takashima-san does all the work. It doesn't feel right."

name: Kagami
message: "I'll go ask if there's anything I can help with."
Kagami got up from her seat.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ah, Onee-chan."

name: Zakuro
message: "Sorry to keep you waiting."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Oh, the curry smells good. It must be delicious."
Tsukasa's eyes sparkled.
She didn't look like she was faking her excitement.

name: Kagami
message: "We made plenty."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes, the two of us made it. Please, eat as much as you like."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yay!"
We carefully piled the curry on top of our rice.
It really did look delicious.

name: Kagami
message: "Huh? Takashima-san, aren't you going to sit down?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I can't. A maid shouldn't eat at the same table as her master."

name: Kagami
message: "What?"

name: Yuki
message: "But you put so much effort into making it. Let's all eat together."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yeah, I'm sure it would taste better if we all ate together."

name: Kagami
message: "That's right. And in that case, I would have to abstain too."

name: Zakuro
message: "Heheh. Understood. Thank you very much. I'll take you up on that offer."
Takashima-san took a chair and wedged herself in right next to me.

name: Kagami
message: "Hmmm, why do you need to sit right next to her?"

name: Zakuro
message: "It's a maid's duty to be at her master's side, ready to attend to her."

name: Kagami
message: "Oh, is that so? Hey, Tsukasa, what do you think the childhood friend character should do in this situation?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "You're right. She would take issue with it, just like that."

name: Kagami
message: "Th-This is how I should act..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Like I said, you're a natural childhood friend, so you don't have to think about acting."

name: Kagami
message: "Urgh... I-I don't really like that answer, but okay, I got it."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, anyway, let's eat."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Let's eat!"

name: Kagami
message: "Let's eat."

name: Zakuro
message: "Let's eat."

name: Yuki
message: "Amph. Hot!"

name: Zakuro
message: "A-Are you all right, Yuki-sama?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yes, yes, I'm fine. It was just a bit too hot."

name: Zakuro
message: "I'm terribly sorry about that. Here."
Takashima-san quickly poured some cold tea in a cup.

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, thank you."
She really had the maid act down.

name: Zakuro
message: "It seems it was a bit too hot. I'm truly sorry."
Takashima-san bowed, scooped up some curry with my spoon, and blew on it.

name: Zakuro
message: "Here you go, Yuki-sama."
She brought the curry to my lips.

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, uh, thank you for all this."

name: Zakuro
message: "No, no, it's my job to take care of you. Don't worry about it."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"
The dishes on the table were shaking.

name: Kagami
message: "Grr... Why, you..."

name: Yuki
message: "Ah!"
Kagami was glaring at me. Her shoulders were shaking.
She had an incredible look on her face.

Her face was pure red, she was biting her lips, and the two stupid locks of hair sticking up from her head (proof that she's twice as dumb as the average person...though if I actually said this to her, she would punch me twice, karate chop me, kick me, and then punch me harder) looked just like a demon's horns.

name: Yuki
message: "U-Um, Kagami-san? I didn't happen to do anything to offend you, did I?"
Unconsciously, I began speaking very politely.

name: Kagami
message: "H-Hey, Tsukasa, in this situation..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yeah, bullseye. You've got your role down perfectly."

name: Kagami
message: "I-I see. That's great."
I didn't understand what was so great.
Especially considering the way her voice was shaking.

name: Zakuro
message: "Yuki-sama?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, sorry."
I realized Takashima-san was still holding the spoon in front of my mouth.

name: Yuki
message: "Ahm."
I tried to eat it in one bite.

name: Kagami
message: "Grrrnnnhhghhhn!"
She looked at her target (me) with eyes that seemed to be trying to incinerate me. Her mouth was open, threatening me with her fangs.

name: Yuki
message: "You're scaring the crap out of me. What's with that look? The curry? Is it the curry? Do you have to kill me now that I ate the curry?"
I came straight out and said it.

name: Kagami
message: "N-No. Isn't it a bit narcissistic to think everything is about you?"
Huh?

name: Kagami
message: "N-No one cares about you. Are you stupid?"

name: Yuki
message: "B-But you're looking over here like..."

name: Kagami
message: "There was a mosquito! I was scowling at the mosquito! You're so obsessed with yourself."
O-Obsessed with myself?
I was pretty sure she wasn't scowling at anything but me. Was I just being overly self-conscious?

name: Zakuro
message: "Yuki-sama, here, have some more."
Takashima-san brought another spoonful to my lips.

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, sure... Mm, mm."
Just right.

name: Zakuro
message: "How is it?"

name: Yuki
message: "It's much better now."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, good. Ah, e-excuse me. I'm glad to hear that, Master."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahaha, don't worry about that. You don't have to be so polite to me."

name: Zakuro
message: "No, you are my master."

name: Kagami
message: "Jeez! Something's weird, Tsukasa! She's the only one benefiting from this!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Oh, really? Maybe the tsundere childhood friend is just overcompensating and has too much tsun?"

name: Kagami
message: "I don't know what the heck a tundra or tsundere or whatever has to do with it, but I understand. I understand that I've had enough of this farce."

name: Yuki
message: "Farce?"

name: Kagami
message: "Here!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Wha―"

name: Kagami
message: "Here. It's hot, right? Open your mouth. I cooled it off for you."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Wow."

name: Zakuro
message: "K-Kagami-san, that is the maid's job."

name: Kagami
message: "I don't care. Here, Yuki, I cooled it down for you, so I won't let you get away with saying it's too hot."

name: Tsukasa
message: "You really are a natural. You stayed in character even after calling it a farce."
Kagami scooped up some curry with my spoon, blew on it lightly, and held it out to me.

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Kagami
message: "E-Eat it."
Kagami averted her eyes self-consciously.

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, uh, sure."
The hand holding the spoon was shaking back and forth.

name: Yuki
message: "U-Uh, Kagami, it's hard to eat when the food is moving."

name: Kagami
message: "What's the matter?! Why do you only have a problem when I do it?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Th-That's not it. It's just hard to eat when the spoon is swaying like that."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yeah. It really is swaying. Or rather, trembling."

name: Kagami
message: "Th-That's just your imagination. Or maybe it's an earthquake?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Nothing else is shaking."

name: Kagami
message: "Then it's Yuki who's trembling."

name: Yuki
message: "Why would I be shaking? Am I an old man?"

name: Kagami
message: "Sh-Shut up. That's just how I am!"

name: Yuki
message: "What do you mean, how you are?"

name: Kagami
message: "Um, uh... Y-Yeah, that's it. I've never held anything heavier than a pair of chopsticks."

name: Yuki
message: "No one like that could deliver such amazing kicks."

name: Kagami
message: "Amazing, are they? Thanks for the compliment."

name: Kagami
message: "A-Anyway, stop nitpicking and eat already."

name: Yuki
message: "Okay, fine."
I opened my mouth as wide as I could and put it over the spoon.

name: Yuki
message: "Ahm."

name: Kagami
message: "Ah."
The moment I put it in my mouth, she closed her eyes like she couldn't bear to look at me.

name: Yuki
message: "Hnm... Thank you for the meal."

name: Kagami
message: "Haaa..."
She gave a sigh of relief.

name: Zakuro
message: "Excuse me, Kagami-san."

name: Kagami
message: "Wh-What is it?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Why did you close your eyes?"

name: Kagami
message: "Huh? Did I?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes, you closed them. If you do that, you'll spill the food. It looks like this really was too much for you to handle."

name: Kagami
message: "Th-That's not true. Yuki, open your mouth."
This kind of felt like they were force-feeding me.
It was like they were giving food to a zoo animal.

name: Kagami
message: "Here."
She brought it to my mouth.

name: Yuki
message: "Okay... Well, here goes."
I opened my mouth wide as she brought the spoon closer. I wondered why Kagami was shaking so much. All she was doing was using a spoon.

name: Kagami
message: "Uuh."

name: Zakuro
message: "Like I said, you mustn't look away."

name: Kagami
message: "Sh-Shut up. I can tell where it is without looking."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, is that right? Using those two antennae on top of your head?"

name: Kagami
message: "Th-That's right. These antennae are connected to my brain. They can sense your position from the vibrations in the air!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, that's quite something. How about this?"
Takashima-san grabbed the two hairs.

name: Kagami
message: "Wha―"

name: Zakuro
message: "So now you can't see?"

name: Kagami
message: "Oh no. I can't see. I can't see anything at all."

name: Kagami
message: "How the hell can you believe something like that, you idiot?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "But you're the one who was lying."

name: Kagami
message: "W-Well, that's true, but..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Now, we should all get along and feed her together."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Zakuro
message: "You mean a contest?"

name: Kagami
message: "I'll accept that challenge!"

name: Zakuro
message: "A contest to see who's better, the maid or the childhood friend!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Or the little sister. You guys always forget about me."

name: Yuki
message: "No, what you're forgetting about is my freedom of choice!"

name: Kagami
message: "Who cares about that?! Here, Yuki. Eat!"

name: Zakuro
message: "I won't lose! Eat mine!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ahaha. If you can, it would be nice if you had some of mine too."
How did this get so chaotic?
I don't understand it at all.

name: Yuki
message: "I a-ate way too much."
Or rather, I was fed too much.
Either way...

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yuki, are you all right?"
Tsukasa asked me that as we were laying around in the living room.

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah. Actually, you were the only one who held back, weren't you?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ahaha. I was a bit scared, since they were getting so into it."
Even though she looked like an idiot on the outside, she was probably the most level-headed one here.
Kagami was silently washing the dishes in the kitchen.
And Takashima-san was in the bathroom, preparing the bath.
Tsukasa was in the living room, laying down. Maybe she had too much curry?
It looked like she was being lazy, but that might have just been because she didn't want to bother the other two.
Tsukasa is that kind of girl.
But... I had a thought.

name: Yuki
message: "You'll get fat if you fall asleep right after eating."

name: Tsukasa
message: "That's okay. I cast a charm to make sure it all goes to my chest."
I take that back. Tsukasa didn't just look lazy. She really was.
But having it so easy like this all of a sudden felt a bit queer... Someone else was doing the chores I always do.

name: Yuki
message: "Kagami, can I help wash the dishes?"

name: Kagami
message: "I'm fine. I'll be done with these in a minute. Go ahead and relax."

name: Yuki
message: "No, I'll get fat if I lay around after eating. Let me get a bit of exercise, okay?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "I could cast the charm so it all goes to your chest too!"

name: Yuki
message: "Hey, what are you―"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Wow, Yuki, your boobs are pretty big."

name: Tsukasa
message: "This is a charm to make your breasts larger by stimulating the mammary glands."

name: Yuki
message: "Hey, that's not a charm at all!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "It is a charm. All of these charms are just for peace of mind, you know."

name: Yuki
message: "If you understand that, you shouldn't be laying around like that."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Sickness comes from the mind. Flat chests do, too."

name: Yuki
message: "I'm not flat-chested!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "But they could be way, way bigger!"

name: Yuki
message: "Ooh, ahh, hey! Stop!"

name: Kagami
message: "What are you doing, Tsukasa?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Whoa, Onee-chan. Sorry. I borrowed Yuki for a bit."

name: Kagami
message: "Jeez. What do you mean, 'borrowed'? It's not like I own her."
Kagami was so upset just a moment ago, but now she was totally calm.
That was a relief.

name: Yuki
message: "It feels like I've got three sisters all of a sudden."
No, it would've been fine if they were like sisters, but...
Something felt weird.

name: Yuki
message: "Jeez. It seems like nothing but weird stuff has been happening since I met Takashima-san."

name: Zakuro
message: "Sorry to keep you waiting, Yuki-sama."

name: Kagami
message: "S-Sorry to keep you waiting, Yuki."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"
Wha―
What the...
...hell?
Why were Kagami and Takashima-san standing in front of me in their swimsuits?
While I was still stunned, Takashima-san circled around behind me.
Kagami took up her position in front of me, though she looked ill at ease.

name: Zakuro
message: "I thought I would come wash your back."

name: Kagami
message: "That's how it is. Hurry up and let us wash your back already."

name: Yuki
message: "W-Well, if that's all, it's not like you both need to be in here. My back isn't that large."

name: Zakuro
message: "Then maybe I should wash the front?"

name: Kagami
message: "There's no such thing as a maid that washes her master's front!"

name: Zakuro
message: "There isn't?"

name: Kagami
message: "Of course not."

name: Zakuro
message: "Then I'll be the first to do it."

name: Zakuro
message: "So, Yuki-sama, please call me Takashima 'the first maid in the world who dared to wash her master's front' Zakuro."

name: Kagami
message: "Wait. I'll do it, then."

name: Zakuro
message: "But there's no such thing as a childhood friend that washes her friend's front."

name: Kagami
message: "Then I'll be the first."

name: Yuki
message: "You know you two are arguing over nothing, right? I can wash my front myself."

name: Zakuro
message: "Just because you can do it on your own doesn't mean you should try to shoulder the burden all by yourself."

name: Zakuro
message: "Trusting another person to do what you could do yourself... Isn't that what it means to be human?"

name: Yuki
message: "What the hell are you talking about?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I know a person who always tries to do the scenario, drafting, CG, acting, and backgrounds all by himself just because he can."

name: Zakuro
message: "And honestly, he's really hopeless."

name: Zakuro
message: "I think I stand for everyone when I say, 'You're delaying the release by trying to do it all yourself!'"

name: Zakuro
message: "We were supposed to start recording a long time ago. We couldn't check the script or anything. I really wish he would knock it off. It's really annoying, to be honest."

name: Zakuro
message: "I hate how he always explains it in this weird nasal voice, like 'H-Hehe, it's been a long time since I've wr―since I've written anything, hehaha, so I can't really get in the swing of it.'"

name: Zakuro
message: "This is your job. I shouldn't have to listen to these selfish excuses. Jeez."

name: Yuki
message: "Uh, I get it, that acquaintance of yours is no good, but that doesn't have anything to do with this."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes, it does. Division of labor is important, Yuki-sama!"

name: Yuki
message: "Okay..."

name: Zakuro
message: "The modern age is the age of labor division. Everyone contributes to society with their own talents."

name: Zakuro
message: "That's how modern society should work!"

name: Zakuro
message: "And that's why today I'll be contributing to society by washing your front, Yuki-sama."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah, it's cold!"

name: Kagami
message: "Sorry. I splashed you... by accident."

name: Zakuro
message: "Th-That was on purpose, wasn't it, Kagami-san?"

name: Kagami
message: "No way. This is a misunderstanding."

name: Zakuro
message: "No, you aimed at me. I saw you do it!"

name: Kagami
message: "Oh, really? Then what were you aiming for, I wonder? Why did that explanation give you a nosebleed, I wonder?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Th-This is... n-not a nosebleed. I'm crying blood!"

name: Kagami
message: "Oh? Those tears come out of your nose, do they now?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Sometimes they do, yes!"
A vein in Kagami's forehead was bulging. The two glared at each other, Takashima-san's nose still bleeding for some reason.
In the bathroom, with me completely naked, and the two of them in their swimsuits...
H-How did this get so chaotic?

name: Yuki
message: "A-All right, you can both wash my back."

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh? What about your front?"

name: Yuki
message: "I'll wash that myself."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ahem. You see, while my acquaintance is technically the president of the company..."

name: Yuki
message: "I said, that's enough about your acquaintance!"

name: Kagami
message: "Haa... Well then, let's get started."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah, that's not fair."

name: Kagami
message: "Sure it is. Look, this half is your territory."
Scratch, scratch.
Kagami ran her fingers over my back.

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah, that's not right. The middle is right here."
Scratch, scratch.

name: Yuki
message: "Hey! Don't touch my back like that! It feels weird."

name: Zakuro
message: "Excuse me..."

name: Kagami
message: "Well then, I'll start washing."

name: Zakuro
message: "I won't lose."
You can imagine what happened after that.
The two of them kept going over my back with their fingers, fighting for territory.
"This is my territory!" "No, it's mine!" They bickered until finally...

name: Yuki
message: "It's my body, so it's my territory!"

name: "E-Excuse me..."
message: Zakuro

name: "Sorry..."
message: Kagami

name: Zakuro+Kagami
message: "E-Excuse me..."

name: Zakuro+Kagami
message: "Sorry..."

name: Zakuro+Kagami
message: I flipped out on them, signaling the end of that war.
I learned something important that day.
Territorial squabbles never lead to good things.
Pitter-patter...
Pitter-patter...
Ooooohh...
A cool breeze blew in and caressed my cheeks.

name: Yuki
message: "Haah. What's wrong with those two?"
Did they always have that kind of personality?
I guess Takashima-san was a bit strange from the start, but it seemed like Kagami was acting weird too.

name: Yuki
message: "What are those two getting worked up about?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Well, that's because they like you, Yuki."

name: Yuki
message: "Ts-Tsukasa."

name: Tsukasa
message: "They both like you, so they're at odds with each other."

name: Yuki
message: "Um, the premise itself of that is weird. I'm a girl, you know?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Really? I don't think that matters when it comes to love."

name: Yuki
message: "Hey, when did that 'like' turn into 'love'?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Am I wrong?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, of course you're wrong. Kagami and I grew up together, and I just met Takashima-san."

name: Tsukasa
message: "And they're both girls?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, exactly."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Oh. So you don't like them?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? Well, I like them, but that's..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "You don't 'love' them, you just 'like' them?"

name: Yuki
message: "That's it. I mean, aren't you the same way, Tsukasa?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Huh? Me?"

name: Yuki
message: "There's no way you could fall in love with me, right?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "That's not true at all. I love you, Yuki."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "So you see, it's not strange at all that the two of them would love you too."

name: Yuki
message: "U-Um... Tsukasa-san? By love, do you mean, uh..."
"Sorry about that. Does your back hurt?"
I looked over to see Kagami standing there, holding a fan in one hand.

name: Zakuro
message: "Sorry about what happened earlier. We might've gotten a little carried away."

name: Tsukasa
message: "You two shouldn't fight. You should get along around Yuki. 'Love & Peace.'"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"
Was the "love" she was talking about "love & peace"?
Tsukasa looked at me and giggled.
W-Was she teasing me?!
